Site.name: Campus Impact Hub MY
Site.tagline: Find scholarships, research, volunteering and competitions that actually move your campus life forward.

Home.title: A sharper way for university students to discover work that matters.
Home.description: Campus Impact Hub MY helps students find scholarships, volunteering calls, research labs, competitions and internships from one focused dashboard.
Home.featuredDescription: Fresh opportunities curated for Malaysian university students with clear deadlines and impact areas.
Home.valueOneBody: Track scholarships, competitions, research and social-impact programs in one calm interface.
Home.valueTwoBody: Use English or Bahasa Melayu without losing context, labels or detail pages.
Home.valueThreeBody: Save opportunities and instantly see what is urgent, upcoming or safe to revisit later.

Opportunities.title: Opportunity board
Opportunities.description: Filter by category, study mode, location and deadlines to find the right next move.
Opportunities.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, keyword or organization

Saved.title: Saved opportunities
Saved.description: Your shortlist is organized by urgency so it is easier to act before a deadline slips.
Saved.emptyBody: Start from the opportunity board and save the listings you want to revisit.

About.title: About the project
About.description: Campus Impact Hub MY is designed as a practical launchpad for university students who want more visibility into meaningful opportunities.

Admin.title: Admin opportunity desk
Admin.description: Create, edit, publish and archive opportunities without leaving the app.

Auth.title: Choose how to continue
Auth.description: Use Clerk when keys are configured, or enter a local demo mode to test the student and admin flows.
